children.heading: Plan required
children.label: a Plan required
children.text: Each State educational agency and specially qualified agency desiring a grant under this subpart shall submit a plan to the Secretary at such time and in such manner as the Secretary may require.
describe the process that the agency will use in awarding subgrants to eligible entities under ;section 6824(d)(1) of this title

describe how the agency will establish and implement, with timely and meaningful consultation with local educational agencies representing the geographic diversity of the State, standardized, statewide entrance and exit procedures, including an assurance that all students who may be English learners are assessed for such status within 30 days of enrollment in a school in the State;

children.label: A
children.text: the agency will ensure that eligible entities receiving a subgrant under this subpart comply with the requirement in regarding assessment of English learners in English;section 6311(b)(2)(B)(ix) of this title

children.label: B
children.text: the agency will ensure that eligible entities receiving a subgrant under this subpart annually assess the English proficiency of all English learners participating in a program funded under this subpart, consistent with ;section 6311(b)(2)(G) of this title

children.label: C
children.text: in awarding subgrants under , the agency will address the needs of school systems of all sizes and in all geographic areas, including school systems with rural and urban schools;section 6824 of this title

children.label: D
children.text: subgrants to eligible entities under will be of sufficient size and scope to allow such entities to carry out effective language instruction educational programs for English learners;section 6824(d)(1) of this title

children.label: E
children.text: the agency will require an eligible entity receiving a subgrant under this subpart to use the subgrant in ways that will build such recipient’s capacity to continue to offer effective language instruction educational programs that assist English learners in meeting challenging State academic standards;

children.label: F
children.text: the agency will monitor each eligible entity receiving a subgrant under this subpart for compliance with applicable Federal fiscal requirements; and

children.label: G
children.text: the plan has been developed in consultation with local educational agencies, teachers, administrators of programs implemented under this subpart, parents of English learners, and other relevant stakeholders;
describe how the agency will coordinate its programs and activities under this subpart with other programs and activities under this chapter and other Acts, as appropriate;

children.label: A
children.text: using a high-quality, effective language instruction curriculum for teaching English learners; and

children.label: B
children.text: in the manner the eligible entity determines to be the most effective;

children.label: A
children.text: the State-designed long-term goals established under , including measurements of interim progress towards meeting such goals, based on the State’s English language proficiency assessment under ; andsection 6311(c)(4)(A)(ii) of this titlesection 6311(b)(2)(G) of this title

children.label: B
children.text: the challenging State academic standards;
describe how the agency will meet the unique needs of children and youth in the State being served through the reservation of funds under ; andsection 6824(d) of this title

children.label: A
children.text: how the agency will monitor the progress of each eligible entity receiving a subgrant under this subpart in helping English learners achieve English proficiency; and

children.label: B
children.text: the steps the agency will take to further assist eligible entities if the strategies funded under this subpart are not effective, such as providing technical assistance and modifying such strategies.

children.heading: Approval
children.label: c Approval
children.text: The Secretary, after using a peer review process, shall approve a plan submitted under subsection (a) if the plan meets the requirements of this section.

children.label: A
children.text: remain in effect for the duration of the agency’s participation under this subpart; and

children.label: B
children.text: be periodically reviewed and revised by the agency, as necessary, to reflect changes to the agency’s strategies and programs carried out under this subpart.

children.heading: Amendments
children.label: A Amendments
children.text: If the State educational agency or specially qualified agency amends the plan, the agency shall submit such amendment to the Secretary.

children.heading: Approval
children.label: B Approval
children.text: The Secretary shall approve such amendment to an approved plan, unless the Secretary determines that the amendment will result in the agency not meeting the requirements, or fulfilling the purposes, of this subpart.

children.heading: Consolidated plan
children.label: e Consolidated plan
children.text: A plan submitted under subsection (a) may be submitted as part of a consolidated plan under .section 7842 of this title

children.heading: Secretary assistance
children.label: f Secretary assistance
children.text: The Secretary shall provide technical assistance, if requested by the State, in the development of English proficiency standards and assessments.
